$comment: REFERENCE SHAPE — the engine-agnostic, UNIVERSAL gameConfig groups shared across every engine (2D Phaser, 3D Three.js). It is NOT consumed by the build (each engine ships its own concrete gameConfig.json that W2 merges blueprint.config into); it DOCUMENTS the shared contract so a new engine's gameConfig.json keeps these groups identical. The 2D-only renderConfig.pixelArt and any 3D-only group (e.g. renderDistance) live in each engine's own gameConfig.json, NOT here.

width.description: VIEWPORT design width in pixels (the browser frame, NOT the world). 9:16 PORTRAIT (432x768) so a fixed canvas fills a portrait phone and letterboxes centered on a landscape laptop — one fixed canvas plays on both mobile and desktop. Engine-agnostic: the fixed-portrait invariant holds for 2D and 3D.

height.description: VIEWPORT design height in pixels. 9:16 portrait (432x768) — see width.
